prompt: A hyper-realistic fashion portrait of a striking young woman captured in a close-up shoulder-up composition, viewed from a subtle side angle as she turns her head softly toward the camera. Her complexion is smooth and luminous with a natural porcelain finish, lightly dusted freckles across the bridge of her nose, flushed cheeks, naturally full rose-toned lips, expressive hazel-green eyes framed by long curled lashes, and defined dark brows. Her rich brunette hair is styled in a neat low chignon, with airy face-framing curtain strands adding softness around her features. She wears understated gold jewelry, including petite hoop earrings adorned with tiny heart pendants and a layered fine-chain necklace. A sleek black camisole with delicate shoulder straps complements the refined editorial styling. Warm late-afternoon sunlight filters through nearby window blinds, casting artistic streaks of light and shadow across her face, neck, and shoulders. The lighting creates a captivating interplay of highlights and contrast, bathing the scene in rich honey-gold tones while maintaining a moody, intimate ambiance. Behind her, the background fades into deep shadows with smooth, creamy bokeh and minimal distractions. Photographed using a professional full-frame camera paired with an 85mm prime lens at a wide aperture, featuring exceptionally shallow depth of field, crystal-clear eye detail, and luxurious background blur. Natural skin texture, realistic imperfections, subtle cinematic grain, sophisticated color grading, luxury beauty advertising aesthetic, high-end magazine editorial photography, ultra-photorealistic rendering, HDR imaging, soft contrast, exquisite detail, and breathtaking 8K quality.

promptZh: 一张超写实的时尚肖像，主角是一位引人注目的 年轻女性，采用肩部以上的特写构图，从微妙的侧面角度拍摄，她正轻轻转头看向镜头。她的肤色光滑透亮，呈现出自然的瓷肌质感，鼻梁上散布着淡淡的雀斑，双颊泛红，嘴唇呈现自然的玫瑰色，榛绿色的双眸富有表现力，长而卷翘的睫毛衬托出深邃的眉形。她浓密的棕色头发梳成整洁的低发髻，几缕轻盈的发丝垂在脸侧，增添了柔美感。她佩戴着低调的 金饰，包括带有心形小吊坠的精致小耳圈和多层细链项链。一件带有精致肩带的时尚 黑色吊带衫，衬托出精致的编辑风格。温暖的午后阳光透过附近的百叶窗射入，在她的脸部、颈部和肩部投下艺术感的光影条纹。这种光线营造出迷人的高光与对比度，使整个画面沐浴在浓郁的蜜金色调中，同时保持了一种深沉而私密的氛围。背景隐入深邃的阴影中，呈现出平滑、奶油般的虚化效果，几乎没有干扰元素。使用专业全画幅相机搭配 85mm 定焦镜头拍摄，采用大光圈，具有极浅的景深、清晰可见的眼睛细节和奢华的背景虚化效果。自然的皮肤纹理、逼真的瑕疵、微妙的电影颗粒感、精致的调色、奢华的美容广告美学、高端杂志编辑摄影、超写实渲染、HDR 成像、柔和对比度、精致细节以及令人惊叹的 8K 画质。
